---
title: 'Friedewald: Summary dataset cardiology outpatient population (conventional units)'
output:
  html_document: default
  pdf_document: default
date: "Report generated on: `r format(Sys.time(), '%Y-%m-%d')`"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, comment = NA)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = rprojroot::find_rstudio_root_file())
set.seed(seed = 200)
```

## Import functions and variables.
```{r, include=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
source('src/simulate_discordance.R', local = discordance <- new.env())
source('src/variables_friedewald.R', local = variables <- new.env())
source('src/predict_friedewald.R', local = friedewald <- new.env())
```

```{r, include=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(gtsummary)
```

## Read data.
```{r}
parameters <- new.env()
parameters$data <- read.csv('data/friedewald_cardio.csv')
parameters$identifier <- "BezoekersID"
parameters$continuous_prediction_function <- friedewald$get_continuous_prediction_ldl
parameters$ordinal_prediction_function <- friedewald$get_ordinal_prediction_ldl
parameters$categorical_prediction_function <- friedewald$get_categorical_prediction_ldl
parameters$model <- NA
parameters$model_variables <- variables$selected_variables_friedewald
```

## Summarise dataset.

- Distribution of predictive variables.
```{r, echo=FALSE}
parameters$data %>% 
  mutate(
    across(
      c("Cholesterol", "HDL.Cholesterol", "Triglyceriden"),
      ~ .x * c(
        Cholesterol = 38.61,
        HDL.Cholesterol = 38.61,
        Triglyceriden = 88.5
      ) [cur_column()]
    )
  ) %>% 
  tbl_summary(
    include = as.character(parameters$model_variables),
    digits = everything() ~ 2
)

- Distribution of reference predictions.
```{r, echo=FALSE}
reference_predictions %>% tbl_summary(
  include = c(continuous_reference, ordinal_reference, categorical_reference),
  digits = everything() ~ 2
)
```
